description: Interlocked sections of rebar that allows for light and effective reinforcement of vehicle sections.
This makeshift combination of springs and scrap, when attached to a vehicle section, protects that section from impacts.  The springs can absorb a surprising amount of damage.

A series of lead-based gaskets, seals and other things meant to keep all Nuclear, Biological, and Chemical contaminants out of a vehicle.  Installing this on a tile will protect people seated there from toxic gas and radiation.
